data.title: Amperity research shows real-time personalization crucial for retailers, impacts purchase behavior and retention. #AI #RetailRevenue.
data.description: In Seattle, a recent study by Amperity reveals that despite significant investments by retailers in personalization, many shoppers continue to face generic and poorly timed experiences. This has led to potential revenue losses and a lack of lasting loyalty. The study highlights the importance of real-time personalization as a key revenue driver for retailers, impacting both purchase decisions and customer retention. The findings from the 2026 State of Personalization in Retail report emphasize the need for improved personalized experiences to maximize revenue opportunities.

data.title: New Oriental Education to release earnings on 2026-01-28. Analysts expect EPS of $0.28; hopes high for beating estimates. Guidance crucial for stock prices.
data.description: New Oriental Education (NYSE: EDU) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, 2026-01-28. Analysts are expecting the company to report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.28. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for newcomers to recognize that guidance plays a vital role in influencing stock prices. In its last earnings release, the company fell short of EPS estimates. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tetra Tech to release earnings report on 2026-01-28, expected EPS $0.31. Past quarter EPS beat resulted in 15.29% share price increase. Share price currently $36.68, down 1.59% YoY. data.description: Tetra Tech (NASDAQ: TTEK) is set to announce its quarterly earnings report on January 28, 2026. Analysts predict an EPS of $0.31. In the last quarter, Tetra Tech beat EPS estimates by $0.04, resulting in a 15.29% increase in share price. Stock prices are influenced by future projections. Shares were trading at $36.68 on January 26, down 1.59% over 52 weeks. Analysts rate Tetra Tech as Neutral with a one-year price target of $44.5, signaling a 21.32% potential upside. Investors hope for positive guidance in the upcoming report. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Calix to release earnings on Jan 28, analysts forecast EPS of $0.30. Past EPS beat saw 9.34% price increase. Shares trading at $55.69. Analysts rate Calix as Buy with $83.17 price target (49.34% potential upside).
data.description: Calix (NYSE: CALX) is set to release its quarterly earnings on 2026-01-28 with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.30. Investors are eager for news of surpassing estimates and favorable guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can influence stock price movements. In the last quarter, Calix beat expectations by $0.20, resulting in a 9.34% increase in share price the next day. As of January 26, Calix shares were trading at $55.69, up 51.37% over the past year. Analysts are bullish on Calix with a consensus rating of Buy and an average one-year price target of $83.17, suggesting a 49.34% potential upside. This article delves into market sentiments and expectations for Calix, highlighting its positive historical earnings performance and current analyst ratings.

data.title: Hubbell launches Aclara360 software for utility operations, connects with grid monitoring systems for remote diagnostics.
data.description: A new solution called Aclara360 has been introduced by Hubbell Incorporated in Shelton, Connecticut on January 27, 2026. This solution is designed to easily integrate with grid monitoring systems, allowing for remote diagnostics to improve reliability and efficiency. This launch marks the company’s commitment to revolutionizing utility operations.

data.title: Cornerstone Bancorp (OTCID: CNBP) declares special dividend of $2.75 per share for shareholders on Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: PALATINE, Illinois - In a recent announcement on January 27, 2026, Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc. revealed that their Board of Directors has approved a special dividend of $2.75 per share. Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc., identified by OTCID: CNBP, operates as the bank holding enterprise overseeing Cornerstone National Bank & Trust Company. This special dividend declaration signifies a positive development for shareholders and highlights the financial strength of the company.

data.title: ACE Cash Express raised $26,000+ for Autism Speaks during annual Give A Little Campaign to support inclusivity.
data.description: In Dallas on January 27, 2026, ACE Cash Express (ACE), a brand under Populus Financial Group, Inc., managed to raise more than $26,000 for Autism Speaks during its Give A Little Campaign fundraising event. Autism Speaks, an organization committed to fostering inclusivity for individuals with autism, received this generous donation from ACE.

data.title: Defense stocks surge as $900.6 billion Pentagon budget for 2026 spurs AI tech revolution, reshaping industry.
data.description: VisionWave Holdings, Inc. has announced that the 2026 defense cycle has begun, marked by a significant Pentagon budget authorization of $900.6 billion. This substantial amount of funding is driving a complete overhaul in the defense sector.

data.title: New agency Near&Dear partners with Addyi, offering services in appearance, performance, sexual health, longevity, self-optimization. Los Angeles, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: A recently established marketing agency, Near&Dear, has surfaced in Los Angeles with a wide-ranging client base that spans across various interconnected sectors including appearance, performance, sexual health, longevity, and self-optimization. The agency is based in Los Angeles and was founded on January 27, 2026. Near&Dear specializes in providing comprehensive marketing services to clients in these diverse categories.

data.title: ISA elevates 8 members to Fellow status in 2026, recognizing excellence in automation; John Cusimano Armexa among them.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, on January 27, 2026, the International Society of Automation (ISA) shared its congratulations for the eight esteemed professionals who have been honored with the title of ISA Fellow in 2026. Among them is John Cusimano Armexa, recognized for his groundbreaking work in cybersecurity. This prestigious designation marks a significant achievement for the selected individuals within the field of automation.

data.title: Mercury Insurance advises on post-storm home protection to prevent water damage. Jan. 27, 2026. NYSE: MCY.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 27, 2026, it was reported that fluctuating temperatures have led to water damage in various parts of the U.S. following a weekend of extreme weather conditions. Local insurance company Mercury Insurance (NYSE: MCY) highlighted the importance of taking early action to reduce water damage and expedite the recovery process. This reminder comes as communities are dealing with the aftermath of snow, ice, and freezing temperatures. The company emphasized the significance of prompt measures to minimize the impact of the weather-related incidents.

data.title: Luka Dončić launches 77X & Fan Pass, offering unique content & experiences for fans. Los Angeles Lakers star.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 27, 2026, Luka Dončić of the Los Angeles Lakers revealed the inception of 77X, a venture dedicated to producing unique entertainment, collectibles, merchandise, and live events for his supporters. Additionally, he introduced Fan Pass, a complimentary membership platform currently accessible for fans to engage with.

data.title: Ekinops partners with NWCCOG to enhance connectivity in NW Colorado. Promotes resilient network solutions.
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland, and Silverthorne, Colorado, a significant partnership was unveiled on January 27, 2026. Ekinops, a prominent provider of optical transport, branch routing, and cybersecurity SASE solutions, has joined forces with the Northwest Colorado Council of Governments (NWCCOG). Ekinops, listed on Euronext Paris under the symbol FR0011466069 (EKI), is known for its expertise in the field. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the industry, signaling a major development in the realm of technology and government initiatives.
